The People

Engineering is
a team
sport.

Behind every project delivery, every precision calculation and every on-time handover is a team of 115 engineers who chose to build their careers around excellence. Part of Parlym Group, PROECO brings together specialists across a wide range of disciplines — united by a shared commitment to solving the problems others find extremely difficult to address.

“We don't hire engineers who know the answers. We hire engineers who ask the right questions.”

Engineering Operations
Engineering Services

Full-Spectrum
Capability

An integrated team of 75+ internal specialists covering every engineering discipline required for complex industrial projects.

View All Services
Process Engineering
PFD, P&ID, HAZOP, process simulation, hydraulic calculations and feasibility studies from concept to detail.
Civil & Structural
Foundations, steel structures, concrete design, piping supports and plot plans for industrial facilities.
Mechanical & Piping
Equipment specification, stress analysis, 3D piping design, skids & packages engineering.
Electrical & Instrumentation
Power systems, single-line diagrams, instrument datasheets, control philosophy and SIL studies.
Automation & Control
DCS/PLC architecture, cause & effect diagrams, safety instrumented systems and SCADA engineering.
Fire & Safety
Fire protection systems, QRA, risk assessment, emergency response engineering and ATEX classification.
